reviews.review_description: I just played through the first introduction screen when entering the game. Overall I like this game, I can use it to replace my VR exercise games to create more excitement in training my body. Making potions is also quite interesting. It makes me feel like a real wizard. I hope you will add more interesting features in the next upgrades.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much, Duy! We’re glad Seeker VR is making workouts more exciting and that you’re enjoying the potion-making. More fun features are on the way—stay tuned! 💜

reviews.review_description: I got this game during the week and just tried it out. It’s soooo much fun!! I’m realising how unfit I am. This sure gives u a great/fun workout. It’s so easy to start and get into even on easy mode u get a decent work out. Can’t wait to make this part of my daily work out.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much, dawna1987aj! We’re glad you’re enjoying Seeker VR—getting a solid workout even on Easy Mode is exactly the goal. Excited it’s becoming part of your daily routine! Stay tuned for more upcoming updates.

reviews.review_description: I’m loving this game and I’m finding it super challenging!  Jumping into a normal play session without doing the intro simply overwhelmed me with the tempo and trying to learn the interaction with objects on the fly. So I definitely recommend taking time to play the intro and consider building up from low to high difficulty in the settings to get your brain/muscles adapted. This means lots to do, great physical activity, loads of fun!  Super realistic while also fantasy and playful environments. I was studying the detailed moss in between pavement stones while the match loaded. Can’t wait to spend more time enjoying this super fun game. Give it a shot!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the amazing feedback, Mcgarnagle17!
We love that you’re noticing both the challenge and the little details in the world. Great tip on easing in with the intro—perfect advice for new Seekers. More updates and adventures are on the way, so stay tuned!

– Team Fake Souls

reviews.review_description:
I found my daily ‘active’ game. It is sooo much fun.

Choose between daylight, evening or night mode to play. 
Avoid obstacles. But if you can hit them, you get extra points for it. I tried to smash them all. 
Punch the gems and the chests to get some extra stuff to make potions. Potions for powerups.

Check my YTchannel for some videos of my gameplay (POWERGIRL_BE).

Didn’t play yet the hard mode, need more practice before I’ll do that 😜😜)

Try it, and I am sure that you gonna like it, just like me.

developer_response.body: We’re thrilled you’re enjoying the game! Stay tuned—there are plenty of exciting new features coming soon!

reviews.review_description: Simple and easy to play. Nice graphics and a real workout. Both myself and the kids love it. The only thing I didn't like was the jumping as I felt unsteady with the headset on, but this can be turned off.

developer_response.body: Thanks, Mirrorpad! We’re glad you and the kids are having fun with Seeker VR.  Stay tuned for more exciting updates!

reviews.review_description: Seeker VR is amazing for getting you moving without it feeling like exercise. Its on rails so no motion sickness for me, hitting, leaning, dodging and jumping keeps your heart rate up while you’re having fun. It’s the perfect mix of coordination and fitness.  And it has customisable settings so you can turn off elements such as jumping.  For me I have not got the biggest room so would love a MR option.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your thoughtful feedback! We’re really glad to hear Seeker VR is giving you a fun workout experience without motion sickness. We also appreciate your note about Mixed Reality support — we agree it would be a great fit, especially for players with limited space.

You can expect MR support in a future update for sure, along with continued improvements to customization options. Thanks again for helping us make Seeker VR better!

reviews.review_description:
I am not a spring chicken and I enjoy the theme and movements. I haven't had thus game very long but I went through the great tutorial and the graphics are beautiful. 

Can't wait to play more and hopefully lose a few inches. Helps you do some good cardio.

developer_response.body:
Mermaid0Sea, thank you so much for this wonderful review! 💜
We’re genuinely honored you enjoyed the theme, tutorial, and movement—and thrilled Seeker VR is helping with cardio goals. Knowing it’s approachable and fun for all ages means the world to us.

Your feedback lights the path for our next updates. If you ever want tweaks, tips, or new modes, we’re listening. Thanks again for playing and for the encouragement!

— Team FakeSouls

reviews.review_title: Fast-Paced Fitness Arcade with RPG Feel
reviews.review_description:
Seeker VR is a fantastic mix of arcade action, fitness, and light RPG elements. The gameplay is simple but highly addictive—grab coins, punch gems, smash chests, and fight off flying enemies while dodging spikes and stone obstacles.

The difficulty ramps up quickly, and some of the most thrilling moments come from those tight one-second windows where you have to jump, dodge, and punch simultaneously. It’s challenging, energetic, and makes for an excellent workout session.

As you play more, you unlock potions and improve your character, giving the game a rewarding sense of progression. Competing on the leaderboards adds another layer of fun, especially when you spot familiar names climbing the ranks.

Overall, Seeker VR is a fun, intense, and motivating way to get moving—perfect for anyone who wants to combine gaming with a real workout.

developer_response.body:
We are exhilarated after reading your review. Nothing makes us happier than knowing our audience is enjoying the gameplay. Thank you very much for your feedback — we will continue adding exciting new features in the future.

– Team FakeSouls

reviews.review_title: A New way for fitness fun
reviews.review_description:
There are a few games like this on quest and I would say this is probably the best of the bunch.
A great variety of objects coming at you, the jumping mechanic is a new thing, punching, dodging ducking are all the abilities you need to get through each round.
Make sure you have  plenty of room and you can fully immerse yourself in this game.
Brilliant collection of colourful animations and great surroundings make this a fun way to get fit.
Well done to Fake Souls on what should be my go to daily workout.

developer_response.body:
Hey GizmoDemi,

We’re glad you enjoyed our game! Your feedback helps us see what’s working and where to improve. We’re already working on adding more features, themes, and colors.

Best regards,
FakeSouls

reviews.review_title: Fun way to burn some calories.
reviews.review_description:
I find that it makes it interesting and far less boring to move using an app like this. 

Duck, punch, evade and jump to keep going. 

Not a big fan of the jumping in VR though. Will have to see if I can disable that option.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the thoughtful review—glad Seeker VR makes the workout less boring.

You can turn jumping off: go to Settings → toggle Jump off to stick with duck, punch, and evade. If anything feels off after that, let us know and we’ll tune it.

reviews.review_title: Some of these reviews are clearly fake.
reviews.review_description:
I'll rather want to give this 2.5 than 2 stars. Anyway, the glowing 5-star reviews have to be fake (and it's a shame they have stooped to this low level), this is only an adequate game at best. The visuals are basic, and the gameplay is not exactly original or exciting. It is certainly an active game, that's about as much as I can credit it. I also find the collision detection hit boxes are off or has lag when hitting objects. I sense something is slightly off.

I would also add, the selection of some graphics is an odd choice. There are flying bees, and demon creatures. It's a strange contrast that doesn't make any sense.

It appears to randomise the run each time, so it can be wildly unfair and unbalanced, making the flow of gameplay awkward. And it's probably the lack of considered and tested set routines that makes this one fail. There are many better exercise orientated games out there, that I enjoy and return to. This ain't one of them.

developer_response.body:
Hi 30MinVR, thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We want to assure you that all of the reviews on our game are genuine—many players have shared their personal experiences because they’ve found value in it.

We understand your points about visuals, balance, and originality. Seeker VR is designed as a fitness-oriented experience where runs are randomized to keep workouts fresh and prevent repetition. That said, we take balance and fairness seriously, and we’re constantly reviewing player feedback to refine difficulty and structure.

Your comments help us see where players feel improvements can be made, and we’ll continue iterating so the game can meet more expectations—not just as a workout, but as an enjoyable experience. We’re glad you gave it a try, and if you have suggestions for specific improvements you’d like to see, we’d welcome hearing them.

Thanks again for your honesty—it helps us grow.


—Team Fake Souls

reviews.review_description: I love the cute graphics! The game starts off easy but quickly ramps up into a fast-paced challenge. It really gets your heart pumping with the cardio-focused gameplay. I also enjoy the crafting system—it adds a fun layer of depth. During one of my runs, I managed to grab a chest with some great rewards, and I appreciate how generous the game feels.

developer_response.body:
Hi oyomoyo,

Thank you for the thoughtful review! We’re glad you enjoyed the challenge, crafting system, and rewards. It’s great to hear the game keeps you engaged—we’ll keep working to add more fun features.

Best,
FakeSouls

reviews.review_title: A fitness game that is still developing.
reviews.review_description: Have spent a short time immersed in this fitness game. You need space to dodge, squat and jump. Can turn off elements if you have some mobility issues. Haven't quite worked out how the potion making relates to the workout yet and I think some additional work on the game objectives and instructions is needed. (at least for me!). I kept moving out of the play area and a message pops up to advise. This message is very distracting and I understand the need for it, but it would help if a visual boundary is displayed when glancing down. Also, am I meant to punch the bees?

developer_response.body:
Hi Lordtaskmaster, thank you for sharing your detailed feedback—it’s really valuable for us. The play area alert you mentioned is there to ensure players don’t accidentally move beyond their boundary and risk injury, but we completely understand that it can feel distracting. We’re already working on an update that will allow players to turn off the alert if they prefer.

Regarding gameplay—yes, you can punch or dodge the bees! We’ll also continue to refine instructions and objectives so things feel clearer and more connected (including potion-making and workout flow).

Thanks again for giving Seeker VR a try and helping us improve the experience step by step.

—Team Fake Souls

reviews.review_title: Punch and dodge your way to 🔥 calories!
reviews.review_description: A cute and easy game where you punch 🥊 and dodge your way to gathering treasure! You’d obstacles coming out of a portal like jumping over logs(you can this off in settings btw), avoiding boulders, and spikes balls. A fun way to 🔥 some easy calories! 🏃‍♂️

developer_response.body:
Hi thetwinkievr.2025,

Thank you for the great review! We’re glad you’re enjoying the mix of punching, dodging, and treasure hunting. Your feedback motivates us to keep improving and adding more fun challenges.

Best,
FakeSouls

reviews.review_description: Super addictive! I end up getting a full cardio workout without even noticing. Potion-making adds a fun twist, and it’s become my go-to daily fitness game. Excited for future updates!

developer_response.body:
Thanks, TinyPikachu!
Thrilled it’s your go-to cardio—and that potions hit the spot. More maps, enemies, and challenges are brewing. Stay tuned!

– Team Fake Souls

reviews.review_description: This is a game that is primarily focused on fun, but with the added dynamics of being health positive, I have really enjoyed the many facets of the game and definitely feels more like play than exercise. this game will appeal to many different age groups, one for the library

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We’re glad Seeker VR delivers both fun and fitness, and we appreciate your support as we continue to improve the experience.

reviews.review_description: Fun, immersive, and super addictive. Perfect for anyone who wants a VR game that keeps you coming back for more I will be back

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words, Antonio! 🙌 We’re thrilled you’re enjoying Seeker VR and that it’s giving you the fun, immersive experience we set out to create. Your support means a lot to us, and we’re committed to making the game even better with each update. Can’t wait to have you back in the world of Seeker VR! 💜

reviews.review_description: Honestly the best game I’ve played in a long time! Very fun to play and encourages me to do fitness the way I like it. All the family enjoys having a run at jt 😄

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for sharing your excitement!  We're glad Seeker VR is giving you both fun and fitness. It means a lot that the whole family is enjoying it together. 
More potions, challenges, and surprises are on the way—so stay tuned and keep seeking!

reviews.review_description: It is a very engaging game and fun to play especially if you want a fun way to work out.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the love, turtlegod7263!
We’re glad Seeker VR makes workouts fun and engaging. More exciting updates are on the way—stay tuned!

– Team Fake Souls

reviews.review_description: Loving this game, so different from the usual fitness games ... challenge yourself lots of ducking, striking and jumping

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the awesome review, HB2210!
Glad you’re loving the unique workout—more maps and challenges are on the way. Stay tuned!

– Team Fake Souls

reviews.review_description: This is a sweet game that allows you to exercise a lot. You really have moved side to side, duck, jump, and punch a lot that really gets one pulse to rise

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re glad Seeker VR is giving you a fun and active workout, and it’s great to hear you’re enjoying the variety of movement the game offers.

reviews.review_title: Cute whimsy game infused with fitness!
reviews.review_description:
In short: The game is good and well worth the money.

In detail:

I came here after watching a short video of turtlegod06gaming annnnddd

I was a bit hesitant after reading some reviews and anyone who buys stuff based purely on reviews knows exactly how stressful a few bad ones can be. Still, I decided to give the game a shot because the whole “potion-making mixed with fitness” concept sounded fun, and the devs seemed active, so why not!

I actually got a really solid cardio workout in. Even with my jump and duck settings turned off, I still had to move around quite a bit! The game is generous with rewards, I scored a rare chest with 1,000 coins on my second try, plus 3–4 common chests. The graphics are cute, toony, and give off cozy mystical-forest vibes.

A note to the devs:
As a player, I’d love to see more witchy props, plus a wider variety of enemies and maps. Keep up the good work!

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the thoughtful review! 🙌
Love that the potion-fitness loop gave you a real workout. We are actively working on adding more enemies and maps. Stay tuned, and keep those chests coming! 💜

— Team Fake Souls
